title: Mellow Roasted Polish Chicken Bowl
description: A solo dinner dish featuring roasted chicken in a silky sauce, made with chicken stock concentrate and candy for a sweet and savory flavor, and is plant-based friendly.

ingredients.name: candy
ingredients.notes: such as gummy bears or candy melts

instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together chicken stock concentrate, olive oil, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chopped onion, minced garlic, chopped carrots, and chopped potatoes to the bowl and toss to coat.
Add the chicken breast to the bowl and toss to coat with the sauce.
Transfer the chicken and vegetables to a baking dish and roast in the oven for 30 minutes.
After 30 minutes, add the candy to the baking dish and continue to roast for an additional 20 minutes.
Remove the dish from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Serve the chicken and vegetables in a bowl and enjoy.
